assignments.label: Assign Latest Claim Update Comment To Variable

assignments.name: Assign_Latest_Deal_Update_To_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Latest Deal Update To Variable

assignments.label: Assign Latest GCC Comment To Text Variable

assignments.name: Assign_Latest_Litigation_Update_Comment_To_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Latest Litigation Update Comment To Variable

assignments.name: Assign_Latest_Project_Comment_To_Text_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Latest Project Comment To Text Variable

assignments.name: Assign_Latest_Ticket_Update_To_Variable

decisions.description: Based on the object type returned from Entity Definition query, take a different path to update records.
decisions.name: Copy_1_of_What_Object_Type_Launched_This_Screen
decisions.label: Copy 1 of What Object Type Launched This Screen?

decisions.description: Based on the object type returned from Entity Definition query, take a different path to update records.
decisions.name: What_Object_Type_Launched_This_Screen
decisions.label: What Object Type Launched This Screen?

Flow.description: Screen built to be agnostic allowing comments to be made across a variety of objects including Fleet Project Management, Claims, Accounts

formulas.name: f_DefaultComment
formulas.expression:
IF( {!Get_Entity_Definition_For_Triggering_Record.QualifiedApiName} = 'leaseworks__Technical_Project__c', {!Get_Triggering_Fleet_Project_Management.pro_Latest_Project_Comment__c},
IF( {!Get_Entity_Definition_For_Triggering_Record.QualifiedApiName} = 'Account', {!Get_Triggering_Account.GCC_Comments__c},
IF( {!Get_Entity_Definition_For_Triggering_Record.QualifiedApiName} = 'leaseworks__Claims__c', {!Get_Triggering_Claim.pro_Latest_Update__c},
IF( {!Get_Entity_Definition_For_Triggering_Record.QualifiedApiName} = 'Litigation__c', {!Get_Triggering_Litigation.pro_Latest_Update__c},
IF( {!Get_Entity_Definition_For_Triggering_Record.QualifiedApiName} = 'pro_Ticket__c', {!Get_Triggering_Ticket.pro_Latest_Ticket_Update__c},
IF( AND( {!Get_Entity_Definition_For_Triggering_Record.QualifiedApiName} = 'leaseworks__Marketing_Activity__c', {!Update_Type} = 'Weekly Commercial Summary' ), {!Get_Triggering_Deal.pro_Commercial_Weekly_Summary_Notes_2__c},
IF( AND( {!Get_Entity_Definition_For_Triggering_Record.QualifiedApiName} = 'leaseworks__Marketing_Activity__c', {!Update_Type} = 'Weekly Legal & Contracts Summary' ), {!Get_Triggering_Deal.pro_Contracts_Legal_Weekly_Summary_Notes__c},
/* Default value if none match */ "" )))))))

Flow.interviewLabel: Screen - Screen For Record Update Comments {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Screen - Status Updates

recordLookups.name: Get_Entity_Definition_For_Triggering_Record
recordLookups.label: Get Entity Definition For Triggering Record

recordLookups.name: Get_Latest_Commercial_Status_Update_For_Triggering_Deal
recordLookups.label: Get Latest Commercial Status Update For Triggering Deal

recordLookups.name: Get_Latest_LEgal_Contracts_Status_Update_For_Triggering_Deal
recordLookups.label: Get Latest LEgal & Contracts Status Update For Triggering Deal

fields.name: ErrorMessage
fields.fieldText:
Something went wrong while processing your request:


{!$Flow.FaultMessage}

variables.description: The record id from which this screen flow got called
variables.name: recordId
